codes.UNKNOWN_ERROR: Er is iets misgegaan. Please try again shortly.
codes.NETWORK_ERROR: We could not connect naar server. Please check your internet connection en try again.
codes.REQUEST_TIMEOUT: server took too long naar respond. Please try again.
codes.BACKEND_HOST_UNREACHABLE: We could not reach server. Please check your internet connection en try again.
codes.SECURE_CONNECTION_FAILED: Secure connection failed. Check backend HTTPS certificate.
codes.CONFLICT: This update conflicts met newer saved clinical data
codes.VALIDATION_ERROR: Please check highlighted fields en try again.
codes.SERVER_ERROR: Er is iets misgegaan while processing your request. Please try again shortly.
codes.BACKEND_UNAVAILABLE: We could not connect naar server right now. Please try again shortly.
codes.BACKEND_ENDPOINT_NOT_FOUND: Backend API endpoint was not found. domain is reachable, but API route is not deployed.
codes.RESOURCE_NOT_FOUND: requested record could not be found. Please vernieuwen en try again.
codes.ADMISSION_NOT_FOUND: admission record could not be found. Please return naar tracking en try again.
codes.BACKEND_METHOD_NOT_ALLOWED: Backend endpoint exists but does not accept this request.
codes.BACKEND_INVALID_RESPONSE: Backend returned an invalid sign-in response. It may be serving website instead of API.
codes.SESSION_STORAGE_FAILED: We could not opslaan your sign-in session. Please try again.
codes.RATE_LIMITED: Too many requests. Wait a moment en try again.
codes.ROUTE_ERROR: An fout occurred while laden this page
codes.INVALID_CREDENTIALS: Invalid e-mail of wachtwoord. Please check your details en try again.
codes.MULTIPLE_TENANTS: Multiple tenants found. Please selecteren a tenant.
codes.SESSION_EXPIRED: Your session expired. Inloggen again naar doorgaan.
codes.USER_EXISTS: This e-mail is already registered. Please sign in instead.
codes.AI_UNAUTHORIZED: AI API key invalid of expired
codes.ADMISSION_SAVE_FAILED: Kan niet opslaan: admission record. Controleer uw verbinding en probeer het opnieuw
codes.ADMISSION_VALIDATION_FAILED: Some vereist admission details are missing. Please beoordelen highlighted fields.
codes.ADMISSION_RECOMMENDATION_FAILED: Unable naar generate clinical recommendations right now. You can still beoordelen en opslaan admission.
codes.VENTILATION_SESSION_DRAFT_LOAD_FAILED: Kan niet laden: admission form. Controleer uw verbinding en probeer het opnieuw
codes.VENTILATION_SESSION_DRAFT_SAVE_FAILED: Kan niet opslaan: local admission draft. Please try again

disclaimer.title: Disclaimer

disclaimer.acknowledgeHint: Confirm that you have read en understood disclaimer

capture.title: Dataset capture
capture.governanceNotice: Captured candidates are submitted voor reviewer approval only. Raw pasted notes are not stored in approved datasets of sent naar external model services.
capture.roleBlocked: Dataset candidate capture requires an approved clinical write rol.
capture.offlineNotice: Offline submissions are in wachtrij met structured fields only en sync when connectivity returns.
capture.notePlaceholder: Paste a de-identified bedside note, then beoordelen structured fields before submitting.
capture.facilityMissing: Selecteer of sign in naar one active faciliteit before submitting.
capture.noteRequired: Paste a note before creating a preview.
capture.identifierWarning: Identifier-like text was detected. It is not included in structured beoordelen payload.
capture.trainingApprovalAvailable: Training approval controls remain in governed beoordelen workflows.

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.localStorageDescription: Preferences en session data are stored only on this device. Geenthing is sent naar external servers.
privacy.optionalAI: If online AI features are enabled, those requests may be sent naar configured services.

about.title: Over
about.prototypeScope: This is a prototype voor reference en training. Geent voor clinical use.

safety.title: Clinical safety
safety.body: AI Vent provides documentation support en advisory safety prompts only. It does not replace clinical judgment, issue treatment orders, of determine beademingsapparaat instellingen.
safety.secondary: Confirm all decisions against Patiënt, your faciliteit workflow, en local clinical protocol.
safety.acknowledgeLabel: I understand this is advisory decision support only
safety.acknowledgeHint: Vereist before continuing naar clinical workflows
safety.syncDeferred: Safety acknowledgement is saved on this device en will be gesynchroniseerd when backend authentication is available.

clinicalSafety.title: Use as advisory support
clinicalSafety.body: Beoordelen safety note before using AI Vent. app can highlight missing data en uncertainty, but a qualified clinician remains responsible voor Patiënt care decisions.

facilityWorkflow.title: Stay in faciliteit context
facilityWorkflow.body: Use active faciliteit en rol shown by your session. Keep records within correct faciliteit workflow en follow local escalation, beoordelen, en approval procedures.

inputs.title: Voer in:ing inputs
inputs.body: Use Opnemen naar voer in: available clinical parameters (SpO2, PaO2, PaCO2, pH, respiratory rate, etc.). Optioneel ABG values improve confidence when available, but missing optioneel data should be reviewed as uncertainty rather than treated as a opslaan blocker.

recommendations.title: Interpreting recommendations
recommendations.body: Recommendations tonen advisory beademingsapparaat setting references met a confidence tier. Match quality reflects how well dataset cases align met your inputs. Use matched cases as reference only en verify against clinical judgment.

monitoring.title: Monitoring en alerts
monitoring.body: After reviewing a aanbeveling, use Monitoring naar log vitals en labs over time. Alerts highlight values outside set thresholds en should be assessed according naar local protocol.

offline.title: Offline behavior
offline.body: Core workflow (Opnemen, advisory summaries, monitoring) works offline. Data is saved locally. Optioneel AI features require connectivity. When terug online, doorgaan as normaal.

glossary.PEEP: Positive end-expiratory pressure (cmH₂O). Maintains lung volume en oxygenation.
glossary.FiO2: Fraction of inspired oxygen (0–1). Percentage of oxygen in inspired gas.
glossary.IERatio: I:E ratio. Inspiratory naar expiratory time ratio (e.g. 1:2).
glossary.PaCO2: Partial pressure of arterial carbon dioxide (mmHg).
glossary.ABG: Arterial blood gas values such as PaO2, PaCO2, en pH, tied naar a sample time.
glossary.referenceStatus: Governance en verification state voor a reference range. Only active approved of verified ranges are eligible voor active decision-support display.
glossary.datasetCapture: Candidate de-identified records that need beoordelen before dataset of training use.
glossary.reviewQueue: A work queue voor beoordelen decisions, corrections, exclusions, en audit reasons.
glossary.syncState: Current offline, online, of syncing state. Clinical records may still need later sync.
glossary.shadowMode: Governed model evaluation mode where outputs remain hidden van normaal clinical workflows.

missingABG.title: Missing ABG values
missingABG.body: Recommendations work without ABG; voer in: SpO₂ en anders vitals when available. voor better matching, toevoegen PaO₂, PaCO₂, en pH when you have them.

offline.title: Using app offline
offline.body: Opnemen, advisory summaries, en monitoring work offline. Data is stored locally. Optioneel AI suggestions require internet. Sync is not vereist voor core workflow.

unverifiedReference.title: Reference range is not active
unverifiedReference.body: Draft, in behandeling, retired, rejected, en unverified ranges are not eligible voor active decision-support display. Beoordelen source, version, scope, en verification status.

roleRestrictedModelHelp.title: Model-readiness help is restricted
roleRestrictedModelHelp.body: Predictive model readiness en shadow-mode details are visible only naar approved governance roles. Geenrmal clinical workflows do not expose model internals.

needsReview.title: Record needs beoordelen
needsReview.body: Use beoordelen queue naar check submitted data, request correction, goedkeuren eligible records, of uitsluiten records met an audit reden.

guides.home: Beoordelen faciliteit context, sync state, active admissions, red flags, en records needing beoordelen before opening a Patiënt workflow.
guides.admit: Capture Patiënt pathway en available clinical values. Mark unavailable data clearly en beoordelen backend-confirmed calculations after opslaan.
guides.tracking: Use tracking naar scan recent ventilation status en beoordelen needs. Read trend flags met source data en local protocol context.
guides.abgVentUpdate: Add new ABG results and ventilator settings as time-stamped records so earlier values remain available for review.
guides.datasetCapture: Use dataset capture voor de-identified candidate records. Human beoordelen is vereist before approved training-data use.
guides.reviewQueue: Use beoordelen queue naar goedkeuren, request correction, of uitsluiten records while preserving audit trail.
guides.dashboard: Use dashboards voor aggregate quality, beoordelen, reference, en governance status. Avoid Patiënt identifiers in governance summaries.
guides.settings: Use instellingen voor account, faciliteit, accessibility, privacy, sync, en reference visibility preferences where authorized.
guides.hypoxemia: Beoordelen FiO₂ en PEEP; consider recruitment; check voor shunt of V/Q mismatch.
guides.hypercapnia: Beoordelen minute ventilation (rate × tidal volume); consider permissive hypercapnia per protocol.
guides.acidosis: Address ventilation en perfusion; correct underlying cause per protocol.
guides.general: Use recommendations as decision support only. Validate against local protocols en clinical judgment.

ai.label: AI-beslissingsondersteuning
ai.enableHint: Use online AI voor complex cases only; local recommendations always available
ai.providerHint: AI provider (e.g. OpenAI); API key is per provider

patientReason.description: Capture Patiënt pathway, leeftijd, body metrics, en reden voor support.

oxygenAbgVentilator.description: Record current oxygen support, observation time, oxygenation, vital signs, available ABG values, en uncertain values. Beademingsapparaat instellingen are suggested on volgende step van dataset.
oxygenAbgVentilator.oxygenSupportHint: Choose support Patiënt is receiving when these values are measured.
oxygenAbgVentilator.timeHint: Use local date en time voor observation.

saveReview.description: Beoordelen en bewerken dataset-suggested beademingsapparaat instellingen, backend readiness, clinician confirmation, override reden when needed, beoordelen status, en sync state.

observations.title: Additional observations
observations.description: Record any extra clinical data not covered above (e.g. labs, imaging, medications, comorbidity scores). Each observation is a single naam–value pair. Optioneel; you can skip this step.
observations.name: Naam

timeSeries.title: Time series (vital signs over time)
timeSeries.description: Track vital signs of anders metrics at multiple time points (e.g. SpO₂, RR, HR at 0h, 1h, 2h). Used voor trend analysis en monitoring after you start session. Optioneel; you can toevoegen points later on monitoring screen.
